raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-A-001] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:2
  HIDDEN_STRLEN_ARG: CHARACTER dummy argument 'transa' (no BIND(C)) injects
  hidden size_t at stack position 14. C prototype declares 13 parameters.
  Stack corruption likely on GCC >= 8 with -O2.

ERROR   [TC-A-001] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:2
  HIDDEN_STRLEN_ARG: CHARACTER dummy argument 'transb' injects hidden
  size_t at stack position 15. Two hidden args total.

NOTE: Workaround: compile Fortran with -fno-optimize-sibling-calls.
      Fix: use BIND(C) with CHARACTER(KIND=C_CHAR) dummy arguments.
